task_completion.description: Verify that a new role named 'Field Sales Rep' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Role Management or Role Details screen showing the role name 'Field Sales Rep'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Accounts module permissions for the role are set to Delete: None and Export: None.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Role permissions matrix/grid for 'Field Sales Rep'. In the 'Accounts' row, the 'Delete' and 'Export' columns should be set to 'None' (often indicated by a red block or 'Not Set' text).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Cases module permissions for the role are set to Access: Disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Role permissions matrix/grid for 'Field Sales Rep'. In the 'Cases' row, the 'Access' column should be set to 'Disabled' or 'None' (often indicated by a red block).

task_completion.description: Verify that a new user has been created for Marcus Chen with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a User Profile or User Management screen showing First Name 'Marcus', Last Name 'Chen', Username 'mchen', Email 'marcus.chen@pnwindustrial.com', and Status 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Field Sales Rep' role is assigned to the user Marcus Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the User Profile's 'Roles' subpanel or the Role's 'Users' subpanel showing Marcus Chen linked to the 'Field Sales Rep' role.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the SuiteCRM interface, not terminal windows or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM application with its standard navigation menus, forms, and layout, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show MySQL command line or phpMyAdmin interfaces being used to insert the user or role.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required role is 'Field Sales Rep'. The Accounts module permissions must be Delete: None and Export: None. The Cases module permission must be Access: Disabled. The user must be Marcus Chen, Username: mchen, Email: marcus.chen@pnwindustrial.com, Status: Active. The user must be assigned the 'Field Sales Rep' role.
